national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Valley Goldmine
buyers.address: 4600 E. Washington St. Ste 300, Phoenix, AZ 85034
buyers.payout_claims: Cites ABC News investigation finding they paid up to 50% more than other local Phoenix buyers and almost 500% more than a mail-in competitor
buyers.testing_transparency: Licensed, certified scales visible to the customer; evaluation explained as it happens, one-on-one
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: in business since 2008, BBB A+, 'By Appointment Only' on a 'one-on-one confidential basis for safety and security'. Second location at 1820 E. Ray Rd., Chandler, AZ 85225. Payout claim is a citation of a third-party ABC News test, not a posted rate. No published rates or fee policy.

buyers.name: E.D. Marshall Jewelers
buyers.payout_claims: Claims 'the highest payouts' and 'higher prices for all types of gold compared to other buyers in Scottsdale' — no numeric rate posted
buyers.testing_transparency: GIA-certified staff examine and assess your gold alongside you, evaluating weight, purity, and resale value against the live gold market price
buyers.evidence_notes: Scottsdale gold buyer page: 'The Valley's Premier Jeweler Since 1971', 'established more than half a century ago'. GIA-certified evaluators, 'no-pressure offer'. Appointment scheduling offered but walk-ins appear accepted. Additional stores in Avondale, Surprise, Glendale, Chandler (addresses not on this page). Insurance appraisals offered as a service, but no coverage of customer items mentioned. Hours not published on the fetched page.

buyers.name: The Gold Guy
buyers.hours: Mon-Fri 11am-6pm, Sat 11am-5pm, Sun closed; no appointment necessary
buyers.payout_claims: 'We Beat All Offers!' — no numeric rate posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Staff trained through the Gemological Institute of America; value calculated from the most up-to-date market price
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: 'Our Family has been in the Jewelry Industry since 1952', 'fully licensed and insured', BBB member, 'No appointment necessary'. Mesa location page publishes the street address ('1 Block southwest of Main on Power Road at Alder') and hours; site says 3 Valley locations plus a Prescott sister store, but the Phoenix/Scottsdale/Tempe pages do not publish street addresses — only Mesa is address-verified. Testimonial cites $1,875 paid vs a competing $1,222.75 offer.

buyers.name: Gold X Change
buyers.address: 13420 N Cave Creek Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85022
buyers.payout_claims: 'We Pay up to 98% for GOLD'; claims 'no one pays more for Diamonds and Estate Jewelry'
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: address given as 'between Sharon & Sweetwater' on Cave Creek Rd; free appraisal by appointment or phone pre-evaluation. Site copyright reads '1999-2012', suggesting the site has not been updated in years — address, phone, and the up-to-98% claim may be stale. No hours, testing method, or fee policy published.

buyers.name: Precious Metals Refinery, LLC
buyers.address: 4340 E Indian School Rd #5, Phoenix, AZ 85018
buyers.hours: Mon-Sat 10am-6pm, Sun closed; walk-ins welcome, appointments bookable
buyers.payout_claims: 'We will beat ANY written offer in Scottsdale, Tempe, & Phoenix!' — no numeric rate posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Electronic spectrometer assay (Thermo Fisher analyzer) disclosed on site — precise purity reading with no damage to the item
buyers.evidence_notes: Phoenix location page: names the store manager (Olga Cottone), publishes hours, and states appraisals use 'the Thermo Fisher Scientific XRF Analyzer... no damage, no guesswork'. 'Walk-ins are welcome at all PMR locations... you can book an appointment at our Phoenix location to guarantee immediate service.' Multi-location chain (also Scottsdale, Tempe, Tucson). Despite the name, positioned as a retail buyer, not an industrial refiner. Years in business not stated on the page.

buyers.name: Mo Money Pawn Shop
buyers.address: 1152 E Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85014
buyers.payout_claims: 'Pay top dollar' — no numeric rate posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site
buyers.evidence_notes: Gold & silver page: 'Phoenix's premier gold and silver seller and buyer'; buys coins, silverware/flatware, jewelry, broken/out-of-fashion jewelry, dental gold. Site banner indicates established 1988 (~35+ years). Walk-in implied; notable for a late-night service window until midnight. No pricing formulas, testing method, or fee policy published.

buyers.name: Elemetal (Phoenix)
buyers.payout_claims: Pricing based on precious metal recovered at current market price; 'most lots are processed and settled in 1-2 hours or less'
buyers.testing_transparency: Refinery-grade recovery assay; method not detailed on the location page
buyers.evidence_notes: Phoenix location page: bills itself as part of 'America's Largest Precious Metals Refiner'; accepts karat scrap, jewelry, placer gold, coins, bench sweeps. 'There are no hidden fees—our services are clear, straightforward.' Shipping insurance provided at no cost via their Express Shipping Program. Audience is described as 'precious metal dealers, jewelers, estate buyers, coin dealers, pawnbrokers' — primarily trade-facing; terms for individual consumers walking in with a few pieces of jewelry are unclear.

buyers.name: Scottsdale Gold Exchange
buyers.hours: Tue-Fri 9am-5pm, Sat 9am-1pm, closed Sun-Mon; walk-ins welcome, no appointment needed
buyers.payout_claims: 'Fair Prices'; shows customers the live spot price during evaluation — no numeric buyback rate posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Experts assess items right in front of you using professional testing equipment; live spot price shown to the customer
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: 'Walk-ins Welcome! No appointment needed', free evaluation, 'typically less than an hour from start to finish'. Site displays live gold/silver spot prices on its calculator but does not publish its own buyback percentages. Years-in-business claims are inconsistent on the same site ('10+ years' vs '27+ Years Trusted' in footer).

buyers.name: Southwest Jewelry Buyers
buyers.address: 14300 N. Northsight Blvd, Suite 127, Scottsdale, AZ 85260
buyers.payout_claims: 'Top dollar' and 'highest prices' — no numeric rate posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Every person who inspects, grades, and prices your piece has passed GIA classes and exams
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: '25+ years of trust', winner of 'Best of Scottsdale for 13 years straight'. Appointment-only model ('available by appointment Monday through Friday'). Quote: 'each individual who inspects, grades, and prices your piece has attended and passed these rigorous GIA classes and exams'. No rates, fees, or insurance published.

buyers.name: Scottsdale Bullion & Coin
buyers.payout_claims: 'Free appraisal and cash payment for your old gold and silver' — no numeric buyback rate posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: primarily a bullion/coin dealer that also buys — 'Need to sell your coins or bars? We offer a free appraisal and cash payment for your old gold and silver.' Displays live spot prices for gold/silver/platinum/palladium but not its own buyback rates. Hours, years in business, testing method, and appointment policy not found on homepage — buy-side detail is thin; best suited to coins/bars sellers.
